div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

div.p: The official URL for this implementation guide is:
Implementation Guide to be used as abase for Implementation Guides in Ethiopia

description.value: Implementation Guide to be used as abase for Implementation Guides in Ethiopia

valueMarkdown.value: This IG uses SMART base computable guideline capabilities

description.value: Indicates whether the client accepted partner or social network-based services
Administrative sub-district (Kebele) within a Woreda.
Administrative subdivision within a Kebele, also called Ketena or Gott.
Administrative zone within a state or region.
Indicates whether the client is an adolescent girl
Value set for documenting ART adherence
Date when antiretroviral therapy was initiated
Catchment area of the HIV patient (such as villages, districts, etc)

name.value: Chlamydia trachomatis Test Type Code System

description.value: Codes for Chlamydia trachomatis test types
Type of Chlamydia trachomatis test performed

name.value: Chlamydia trachomatis Test Type Value Set

description.value: Allowed values for Chlamydia trachomatis test types

name.value: Clinical Enquiry for Intimate Partner Violence (IPV)

description.value: Indicates whether clinical enquiry for intimate partner violence (IPV) was conducted
ValueSet for community entry points
Captures confirmatory STI result and treatment details
Captures syphilis confirmatory test type and related details
Codes for confirmatory syphilis test types
Value set for confirmatory syphilis test types
Indicates whether the patient consents to be contacted for follow-up or program communication

name.value: Consent to Receive Family Planning Follow-up Messages

description.value: Indicates whether the client consents to receive SMS or other messages for family planning follow-up
Indicates types of counselling provided to the client
Types of counselling provided to client

name.value: Count of contacts or partners given for social network/partner services

description.value: Number of contacts or partners elicited for partner notification or social network-based services
Date when the HIV test specimen was sent to the laboratory
Indicates whether the date of birth is estimated rather than exact.

name.value: Date of First HIV Positive Test

description.value: Date of first positive test indicative of HIV diagnosis
Extension to record the educational status of the patient
CodeSystem representing the educational status categories used in Ethiopia
ValueSet containing all education status codes used in Ethiopia

Interim local Observation.code concepts for Ethiopia-specific observations that currently lack a correct or tx-resolvable LOINC code. These SHOULD be mapped to proper LOINC codes when available (see REMEDIATION-REPORT.md).
CodeSystem representing the occupation categories used in Ethiopia
ValueSet containing all occupation codes used in Ethiopia
Administrative states and city administrations of Ethiopia
Allowed list of Ethiopian states and city administrations.
Physical service delivery locations registered in the Ethiopian MFR.
Patient Gender....
Patient Marital Status....
This profile represents a standard Ethiopian patient, applicable across all use cases and health information systems.
Example instance conforming to the Ethiopian Patient profile
Estimated date when the patient is expected to deliver
Date the facility was registered or created in the Ethiopian Master Facility Registry.
ValueSet for facility entry points
Gestational age in weeks (and optionally days)
Captures gonorrhoea test date, specimen type, test result, treatment start date, and other specimen specification
The family name of the person's grandfather.

name.value: Herpes Simplex Virus (HSV) Test Type Observation

description.value: Type of Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test performed

name.value: Herpes Simplex Virus Test Type Code System

description.value: Codes for Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test types

name.value: Herpes Simplex Virus Test Type Value Set

description.value: Allowed values for Herpes simplex virus (HSV) test types
Indicates whether the client reported having used an HIV self-test before
Codes representing the client's adherence to ART treatment
Assay number used in HIV testing strategy
Assay sequence in HIV testing strategy
Permitted assay numbers in HIV testing strategy
Result of HIV assay
Allowed HIV assay results
Indicates whether the client has been informed of their HIV test result.
Clinical HIV-related conditions and diagnoses
Value set representing HIV-related conditions and statuses
Date when HIV diagnosis was established
Facility where the client received an HIV-positive diagnosis
Codes representing possible HIV exposure routes
Records ways in which the client was exposed to HIV
Represents a partner or contact identified during HIV testing services

name.value: HIV Prevention Services and Referrals CodeSystem

description.value: Prevention services offered and referrals provided

name.value: HIV Prevention Services and Referrals ValueSet

description.value: Patient profile for individuals enrolled in the national HIV program
Captures whether HIV retesting prior to ART initiation was conducted and whether the client is at elevated risk for HIV acquisition
Type of HIV infection (HIV-1 or HIV-2)
Codes for HIV-1 and HIV-2
HIV serotype classification
Indicates whether an HIV test was conducted
Indicates whether an HIV test was ordered
Type of HIV test performed
Types of HIV tests
Permitted HIV test types
Defines entry points for HIV Testing Services
ValueSet of HIV Testing Service entry points

name.value: HIV Testing for community entry point CodeSystem

description.value: Defines entry points for community entry point

name.value: HIV Testing for facility entry point CodeSystem

description.value: Defines entry points for facility entry point
Reasons for HIV testing
Codes for HIV Testing Services (HTS) service types.
Value set for HTS service delivery types.
Indicates whether the infant is currently being breastfed by the mother
Outcome of intimate partner violence enquiry
Results of intimate partner violence enquiry
Specifies the type of key population the client belongs to
Indicates whether the client is a member of a key population with increased risk of HIV

name.value: Mycoplasma genitalium Test Type Code System

description.value: Codes for Mycoplasma genitalium test types
Type of Mycoplasma genitalium test performed

name.value: Mycoplasma genitalium Test Type Value Set

description.value: Allowed values for Mycoplasma genitalium test types

name.value: Neisseria gonorrhoeae Test Type Code System

description.value: Codes for Neisseria gonorrhoeae test types
Type of Neisseria gonorrhoeae test performed

name.value: Neisseria gonorrhoeae Test Type Value Set

description.value: Allowed values for Neisseria gonorrhoeae test types
Codes identifying free-text 'specify' Observation.component slices (e.g. other / point-of-care test type), used as the slice discriminator value.
Extension to record the occupation of the patient
Indicates whether partner or social network-based services were offered
Indicates whether voluntary partner services were offered
Indicates other clinical services offered to the client
Other clinical services offered to the client
Indicates other support services provided to the client
Support services provided to the client
Types of contacts or partners for partner services
Indicates whether the client's partner belongs to a high-risk population
HIV status of the client's partner
Captures HIV status disclosure and notification planning for partner services
Codes for referral through partner services
CodeSystem representing the Prefered Contact
Patient’s preferred communication channel.
Indicates whether the client is currently pregnant
Encounter profile for PrEP/PEP services.
Represents scheduled PrEP visit intervals.
Indicates attendance of a scheduled PrEP visit by interval.
Codes representing reasons for PrEP/PEP visits.
Indicates HIV prevention services offered and referrals provided to the client
Indicates whether the client was referred through partner services and the type of referral
Identifier for reporting hierarchy

name.value: Sexual and Reproductive Health Integrated Services

description.value: Indicates SRH integrated services provided to the client

name.value: Sexual and Reproductive Health Integrated Services CodeSystem

description.value: Types of SRH integrated services provided

name.value: Sexual and Reproductive Health Integrated Services ValueSet

description.value: Codes for STI test results
Observation for STI test result with confirmatory test date
Value set for STI test results
Captures whether any STI syndrome was diagnosed, date of STI test, and STI(s) tested for
Indicates whether the client is reported to have had suspected exposure to HIV
Indicates contact with and suspected exposure to HIV.
Captures the syndrome or STI diagnosed, including option to specify other conditions
Codes for syphilis test types
Type of syphilis test performed
Allowed syphilis test type values
Captures syphilis test date, test result, and treatment initiation date

name.value: Trichomonas vaginalis Test Type Code System

description.value: Codes for Trichomonas vaginalis test types
Type of Trichomonas vaginalis test performed

name.value: Trichomonas vaginalis Test Type Value Set

description.value: Allowed values for Trichomonas vaginalis test types
Captures follow-up type, recommended date, scheduled appointment date/time, and additional details
Captures adverse events following VMMC, including severity, timing, seriousness, and date
Indicates whether Voluntary Medical Male Circumcision (VMMC) procedure was performed
Captures the date/time when the VMMC procedure was performed
Ways in which the client was exposed to HIV
Indicates whether the client is a young woman
